title: Orient Electric Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Orient Electric Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Orient Electric Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Navi Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Orient Electric Ventures Solutions:
Orient Electric Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric Ventures Solutions!
